query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN shippedAt IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_shipped_at, SUM(CASE WHEN orderDate IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_order_date FROM orders;
